qa_pairs.question: Which cross references come from the Business source system code?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT cmi_cross_references.cmi_cross_ref_id FROM cmi_cross_references
WHERE cmi_cross_references.source_system_code = 'Business'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which cmi cross references entities with source system code equal to 'Business'?

qa_pairs.question: Which cross references come from Benefits for customers whose cmi details is Gottlieb, Becker and Wyman?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT cmi_cross_references.cmi_cross_ref_id FROM cmi_cross_references
JOIN customer_master_index ON cmi_cross_references.master_customer_id = customer_master_index.master_customer_id
WHERE customer_master_index.cmi_details = 'Gottlieb, Becker and Wyman' AND cmi_cross_references.source_system_code = 'Benefits'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which cmi cross references entities with source system code equal to 'Benefits', having at least one related customer master index record (linked on cmi_cross_references.master_customer_id = customer_master_index.master_customer_id) with cmi details equal to 'Gottlieb, Becker and Wyman'?
